scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/server && npm run typecheck -w packages/client
